hero.title: Bill Splitter
hero.description: Build a private bill, allocate item-level costs, and record settlement progress without moving money.

flow.title: Create → Allocate → Settle
steps: Record paid amounts and review balances

differences.title: Clear shares without payment processing
differences.description: Bill Splitter calculates from user-entered line items and adjustments while keeping financial boundaries explicit.

items.title: Allocate the actual bill
items.description: Split each line equally, to one participant, or by exact custom amounts.

items.title: Reconcile every cent
items.description: Discount, tax, service charge, and tip are distributed deterministically.

items.title: Record progress
items.description: See participant shares, paid amounts, and outstanding balances.

feel.title: Fast, transparent, and reversible
feel.description: Draft-first editing makes complex bills easy to build and check.

items.title: Traceable
items.description: Every participant share is supported by item allocations.

items.title: Safe
items.description: Invalid totals, duplicate participants, and unsafe deletes are rejected.

items.title: Focused
items.description: No bank links, currency conversion, debt collection, or financial advice.

audiences.title: Who uses Bill Splitter
audiences.description: For people sharing a short-lived expense.

items.title: Friends
items.description: Divide meals and group purchases by item.

items.title: Households
items.description: Record one-off shared costs without recurring accounting.

items.title: Trip groups
items.description: Keep a clear settlement reference for a shared bill.

resourceSection.title: Bill essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed for a complete split.

items.title: Participants
items.description: Names, optional email, notes, shares, and paid amounts.

items.title: Items
items.description: Quantity, unit price, line total, and allocation method.

items.title: History
items.description: Search, filters, pagination, direct details, and durable refresh.

groupedSection.title: Accurate by construction
groupedSection.description: Authoritative arithmetic stays on the API.

items.name: Record
items.description: Update paid amounts until balances settle.

technicalSection.title: Private, isolated, and decimal-safe
technicalSection.description: Owner-scoped APIs and an isolated database preserve financial-record boundaries.
items: Decimal arithmetic is authoritative; floating point is presentation-only.
Nested records cascade only with their owning bill.
Settlement records are informational and do not transfer funds.
